perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a title card over a blurred car interior. A woman with long reddish-brown hair, wearing a yellow dress, enters the passenger seat of a car with a joyful, exaggeratedly sweet expression. (2) The scene cuts to the same woman entering the car, but this time she is shouting and looking angry, with fire graphics overlaid on the screen. (3) The setting changes to an indoor restaurant; the woman peels a shrimp with a bright smile and holds it out towards the camera. (4) The scene shifts to the same restaurant where she eats a shrimp herself with a bored and judgmental face while leaning on her hand. (5) Back in the car, she is seen laughing uncontrollably at something the driver said. (6) In the final segment, she sits in the car with a stern, unimpressed face, eventually pulling at her seatbelt while speaking dismissively.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Light, upbeat, and sweet piano music plays. A female voice speaks in a high-pitched, gentle, and polite tone. (2) A sudden fire/explosion sound effect occurs. The female voice becomes loud, aggressive, and shouting. (3) Soft, romantic instrumental music fades in. The female voice is soft, affectionate, and rhythmic. (4) Quirky, comedic music with a fast tempo starts. Slurping and chewing sounds are emphasized. The female voice is low and grumbling. (5) A warm, acoustic guitar melody plays. An off-screen male voice tells a joke. The female voice responds with loud, energetic laughter. (6) Tense, comedic background music plays. The male voice tells another joke, followed by the female voice speaking in a sharp, sarcastic, and annoyed tone. (7) The video ends with a comical 'boing' sound effect.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '交往前 VS 交往後' (Before Dating vs. After Dating) - Setting the comedic premise. (2) Decorative Text: '交往前' and '交往後' labels appear to distinguish the scenes. (3) Hook Text: '寶寶不用特別來載我啦' (Baby, you don't need to specifically pick me up) - Sweet tone. (4) Effect Text: '劉俊廷你讓我等??!' (Liu Junting, you make me wait??!) - Angry tone. (5) Decorative Text: '(爛笑話也能笑)' (Can laugh at even bad jokes) and '(嘲諷值 1000000%)' (Sarcasm level 1000000%) - Adding humorous context.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Repeated Comparison Cycles (Sweet vs. Angry/Indifferent) -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator visible throughout; 1 male driver partially visible or heard off-screen.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long, dyed reddish-brown hair, wearing a yellow sleeveless dress in most scenes.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a modern car with leather seats and a sunroof; a brightly lit restaurant with wooden tables and food dishes.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural daylight in the car; warm indoor lighting in the restaurant.

vocal_qualities.tone: Varies between extremely sweet/gentle and harsh/angry

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Comparison A (Before) -> Comparison A (After) -> Comparison B (Before) -> Comparison B (After) -> Comparison C (Before) -> Comparison C (After).
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To create a relatable comedic skit highlighting the perceived change in behavior and attitude within a romantic relationship after the 'honeymoon phase' ends. It uses exaggerated performance to contrast extreme politeness with blunt familiarity.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: A bottle of PH9.0 alkaline water is clearly placed in the car's cup holder throughout multiple scenes.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-contrast acting between 'sweet' and 'savage' personas; fast-paced text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages common relationship tropes to drive engagement through relatability. The production uses visual cues like fire and heart graphics to amplify emotional shifts.
